elements.name: Description
texts: Frontispiece etching of the waiting pilgrims and ferry boats to Station Island from the south shore of Lough Derg

elements.name: Source
texts: Hardy, Philip Dixon, The Holy Wells of Ireland : Containing an Authentic Account of Those Various Places of Pilgrimage and Penance Which Are Still Annually Visited by Thousands of the Roman Catholic Peasantry.
